name: Detroit Lawyers PLLC
description_short: Michigan-based bankruptcy law firm specializing in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings with remote consultation options via phone and Zoom.
description_long:
Detroit Lawyers, PLLC is a Michigan bankruptcy law firm that assists individuals navigating Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy proceedings. The firm operates with a focus on accessibility, offering same-day consultations and remote filing options to reduce the burden on clients during financial distress. Their website emphasizes continuity of service, noting that the office remained open during COVID-19 disruptions and maintains flexible meeting arrangements.

The firm offers free bankruptcy evaluations that guide clients through a comprehensive questionnaire covering debt sources, assets, income, and household composition. This evaluation process feeds into personalized consultations with licensed Michigan bankruptcy attorneys. Clients can receive results via email, voice call, or text message. The firm claims to handle the entire bankruptcy discharge process remotely, allowing clients to complete filings without in-person office visits.

Detroit Lawyers, PLLC distinguishes itself through convenience-focused service delivery—emphasizing same-day phone/Zoom consultations and remote discharge proceedings. The website includes video testimonials, an FAQ section addressing common bankruptcy questions, and multiple contact channels (phone: 248.237.7979, online scheduling, chat support). Their marketing highlights that they are not a generic legal service provider, though specific differentiators beyond convenience are not elaborated on the website.

The firm provides legitimate bankruptcy legal services for Michigan residents. However, the website contains limited information about attorney credentials, experience levels, pricing structures, or case success metrics. Prospective clients should verify attorney qualifications and obtain clear fee estimates before engagement, as bankruptcy costs vary significantly by chapter type and complexity.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers free bankruptcy evaluations with no obligation
Same-day phone and Zoom consultations available
Remote bankruptcy discharge process—clients can complete filings without office visits
Multiple contact channels: phone (248.237.7979), online scheduling, live chat, and email
Comprehensive intake form assesses diverse debt types (credit cards, medical, student loans, tax, child support)
Video testimonials from actual clients available on website
Flexible result delivery options (email, voice call, text message)
cons: Website does not list individual attorney names, credentials, experience, or biographical information
No pricing information provided; Chapter 7 cost question is marked as FAQ but answer not accessible from provided content
Limited information about Chapter 13 restructuring plans or case success rates
No clear timeline stated for evaluation results or filing completion
Chat support shows offline status with generic 'we will get back to you' message
best_for: Michigan residents seeking remote bankruptcy consultations and filings without in-person office visits
Individuals with multiple debt types (credit cards, medical, student loans, tax debt) needing Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 guidance
Consumers who prefer initial contact via phone or Zoom before committing to attorney representation
diagnosis: Detroit Lawyers, PLLC is best suited for Michigan residents seeking accessible, remote bankruptcy legal services with flexible scheduling. The primary caveat is that the website provides minimal information about attorney qualifications, experience, or transparent pricing—prospective clients must request detailed credentials and fee disclosures before engaging services.
services: Free bankruptcy evaluations via online form
Same-day bankruptcy consultations via Zoom video meeting
Remote bankruptcy discharge completion (no in-person office visit required)
Personalized bankruptcy evaluation results delivery via email, voice call, or text
FAQ and educational resources on Michigan bankruptcy law
COVID-19 accommodation services (virtual consultations and filings)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
